function: Convert rider input into braking command
potential_failure_mode: Lever pivot binds and prevents smooth actuation
potential_effect: Delayed braking command or delayed release
potential_cause: Dirt ingress corrosion poor pivot tolerance
recommended_action: Use sealed bushing corrosion-resistant pivot and lever return test

function: Maintain structural integrity under rider input
potential_effect: Sudden loss or reduction of rider brake input
potential_cause: Stress concentration low material strength impact damage
current_control: Static load test and visual inspection
recommended_action: Add fatigue assessment radius improvement and material specification
critic_notes: High severity but occurrence low; keep with S explanation

potential_failure_mode: Lever ratio produces excessive mechanical advantage
potential_effect: Over-aggressive braking and wheel lock tendency
potential_cause: Poor leverage design inadequate modulation evaluation
recommended_action: Tune lever ratio and validate modulation with defined load cases
critic_notes: Distinct from wheel-level lock because cause is lever design

potential_effect: Sudden severe loss of braking force
potential_cause: Insufficient clamp torque missing retainer poor assembly
current_control: Torque check and functional brake test
recommended_action: Add positive retention feature torque marking and assembly poka-yoke
critic_notes: CPSC cable attachment anchor supports inclusion

potential_failure_mode: Cable frays or stretches at routing bend
potential_cause: Sharp bend fatigue abrasive housing poor routing
current_control: Visual cable inspection and adjustment check
recommended_action: Increase bend radius add liner and define replacement interval
critic_notes: Keep; not duplicate of detachment because progression differs

potential_effect: Sporadic brake engagement and unpredictable deceleration
potential_cause: Kinked cable sticking linkage housing contamination
recommended_action: Add smooth-routing requirement and full-stroke return test
critic_notes: Directly aligned with sporadic engagement evidence

function: Maintain hydraulic pressure if hydraulic brake is used
potential_failure_mode: Hydraulic leak or air ingress reduces pressure
potential_effect: Reduced braking force and increased stopping distance
potential_cause: Seal degradation loose fitting poor bleeding
recommended_action: Specify pressure-rated fittings and production leak test
critic_notes: Conditional on hydraulic variant; mark as applicable when hydraulic

function: Convert input into pad clamping force
potential_effect: Brake drag or delayed clamping response
potential_cause: Corrosion debris seal swelling poor lubrication
recommended_action: Improve dust sealing specify compatible lubricant and cleaning guidance

potential_effect: Uneven pad wear noise and reduced braking consistency
potential_cause: Poor bracket tolerance loose mounting bent support
recommended_action: Add alignment fixture torque sequence and service tolerance
critic_notes: Lower severity justified; not primary loss of braking

potential_effect: Longer stopping distance and reduced braking margin
potential_cause: Normal wear abrasive debris delayed replacement
recommended_action: Add wear indicator minimum thickness marking and maintenance interval

potential_failure_mode: Pad contamination by oil water or debris
potential_cause: Environmental exposure cleaning residue road debris
recommended_action: Add contamination warning shielding and replacement instruction

potential_effect: Braking force decreases during repeated stops or slope descent
potential_cause: Inadequate compound heat buildup insufficient rotor heat capacity
recommended_action: Define thermal fade test and use higher-temperature pad compound

potential_failure_mode: Rotor warps or has excessive runout
recommended_action: Specify runout limit rotor material and heat treatment control

potential_effect: Reduced heat capacity and degraded braking performance
potential_cause: Abrasive debris low hardness delayed replacement
recommended_action: Mark minimum thickness and include service gauge instruction

potential_failure_mode: Caliper bolt loosens or retaining fastener backs out
potential_effect: Caliper shift misalignment or severe braking loss
potential_cause: Vibration insufficient torque no locking feature
recommended_action: Use locking fastener torque stripe and assembly verification

function: Preserve structural support under braking load
potential_effect: Caliper displacement and reduced braking control
potential_cause: Fatigue overload casting defect sharp corner
recommended_action: Increase fillet radius safety factor and fatigue analysis
critic_notes: High D because hidden crack may progress

potential_failure_mode: Brake does not engage when commanded
potential_effect: Excessive stopping distance and collision risk
potential_cause: Cable detachment hydraulic leak seized linkage or severe pad failure
recommended_action: Add pre-ride check procedure and design-level fail-safe review
critic_notes: General effect row kept as system-level hazard aggregator

potential_failure_mode: Brake engages too aggressively or unexpectedly
potential_effect: Wheel lock skid and rider fall
potential_cause: Poor modulation sticking mechanism excessive leverage
recommended_action: Define modulation acceptance criteria and adjust leverage/friction pairing
critic_notes: Directly tied to excessive engagement scenario
